allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Redesign homepage to match original mockup *)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\OllieRescue\\images\\ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length; "---DOWNLOADS---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-3\) -and $_.Extension -match 'jpg|jpeg|png' } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime)
